rulings.Case Title: PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. SHUI KING KWON HOM et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 4, 2017, Line 1. DEFENDANT STEPHEN HOM'S MOTION TO DISMISS. DENIED. As of October 2, 2017 there is no notice of entry of order filed by Defendants on file. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOANNA PFEISTER VS. KIM CHI VU
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order To Compel Joanna Pfeister To Arbitration And An Order To Stay Action Pending Arbitration
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 4, 2017, Line 4. DEFENDANT KIM VU'S Motion For An Order To Compel Joanna Pfeister To Arbitration And An Order To Stay Action Pending Arbitration. GRANTED. This matter shall proceed to arbitration per the terms of the Purchase Agreement. This action shall be stayed. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RAUL VASQUEZ VS. NATIONAL DEFAULT SERVICING CORPORATION ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 4, 2017, Line 5. DEFENDANTS NATIONAL DEFAULT SERVICING CORPORATION, SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer to the cause of action for violation of CC 2923.55 is sustained without leave to amend. This cause of action is barred by res judicata. Demurrer to the cause of action for violation of CC 2924.12 is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to seek damages under CC 2924.12(b), not injunction under CC 2924.12(a) as trustee's deed upon sale has been recorded. Demurrer to causes of action for violation of CC 2923.6, 2923.7 and UCL is overruled. These causes of action are sufficiently alleged and are not barred by res judicata. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 16-50 LAGUNA 12, LLC VS. JEREMY HOUGH ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 4, 2017, Line 6. DEFENDANT JEREMY HOUGH'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. GRANTED, subject to (1) opposition; (2) Defendant posting $10,450.40 with the Court no later than October 6, 2017; and then (3) Defendant filing answer no later than October 6, 2017. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JAMIE LEE VS. PATRICIA TELLERIA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 4, 2017, Line 7. DEFENDANT'S DEYSIS CARACHE, EDUARDO ALVARADO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustained in part and overruled in part. The demurrer based on uncertainty is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to attach only relevant notices and to allege facts re: allegations of current rent owed vs. the amount of rent upon which the late fees for 5 months ($800) are calculated. Demurer is otherwise overruled as complaint states a cause of action for unlawful detainer. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ART WALKER VS. JACOB MOCHEZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 4, 2017, Line 8. DEFENDANT JACOB MOCHEZ'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to address all issues raised by the demurrer. No opposition filed. =(501/REQ)
